mapper.insert: insert into task_instances (task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason) values (#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checklistId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assignedUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assignedDepartmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{completedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{requireAck,jdbcType=BIT}, #{acknowledgedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{acknowledgedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requiresManagerApproval,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rejectionReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduledStartAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{scheduledEndAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{scheduleStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleProposedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleProposedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{scheduleConfirmedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleConfirmedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{scheduleRescheduleReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleCancelReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleNoShowReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update task_instances set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, checklist_id = #{checklistId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_template_id = #{taskTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, assigned_user_id = #{assignedUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assigned_department_id = #{assignedDepartmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, completed_at = #{completedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, require_ack = #{requireAck,jdbcType=BIT}, acknowledged_at = #{acknowledgedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, acknowledged_by = #{acknowledgedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, requires_manager_approval = #{requiresManagerApproval,jdbcType=BIT}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approved_by = #{approvedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approved_at = #{approvedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approver_user_id = #{approverUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scheduled_start_at = #{scheduledStartAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, scheduled_end_at = #{scheduledEndAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, schedule_status = #{scheduleStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_proposed_by = #{scheduleProposedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_proposed_at = #{scheduleProposedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, schedule_confirmed_by = #{scheduleConfirmedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_confirmed_at = #{scheduleConfirmedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, schedule_reschedule_reason = #{scheduleRescheduleReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_cancel_reason = #{scheduleCancelReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, schedule_no_show_reason = #{scheduleNoShowReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason from task_instances where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason from task_instances

select ti.task_id, ti.company_id, ti.checklist_id, ti.task_template_id, ti.title, ti.description, ti.status, ti.due_date, ti.assigned_user_id, ti.assigned_department_id, ti.completed_at, ti.created_by, ti.created_at, ti.updated_at, ti.require_ack, ti.acknowledged_at, ti.acknowledged_by, ti.requires_manager_approval, ti.approval_status, ti.approved_by, ti.approved_at, ti.rejection_reason, ti.approver_user_id, ti.scheduled_start_at, ti.scheduled_end_at, ti.schedule_status, ti.schedule_proposed_by, ti.schedule_proposed_at, ti.schedule_confirmed_by, ti.schedule_confirmed_at, ti.schedule_reschedule_reason, ti.schedule_cancel_reason, ti.schedule_no_show_reason from task_instances ti join checklist_instances ci on ci.checklist_id = ti.checklist_id and ci.company_id = ti.company_id where ti.company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ci.onboarding_id = #{onboardingId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
